name: Dark Mysteries Anjaan Kahaniyaan
overview: Anjaan Kahaniyaan unravels many unexplained mysteries. Based on first-hand accounts of those who claim to have experienced black magic, reincarnations, curses, haunting and other supernatural phenomena, the show will reveal myriad stories.

trailers.title: Dark Mysteries: Anjaan Kahaniyaan |Andhere Mein Chupe Raaz Ab Bahar Aayenge |  discovery+
